summary: Fine matrix recording captures a strong early‑84 performance that many rank among the year’s top shows.
review: The two reviewers praise this April 21, 1984 concert as a standout of the year, calling it one of the top‑10 shows for ’84 and noting the band “rocked” throughout. Kevin Tobin’s matrix mix is highlighted as clean and well‑balanced, making the show enjoyable even without an original soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave high marks (4‑5 stars) and spoke positively about the performance; recording is described as a fine matrix, indicating good technical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes a "fine matrix" and praises Kevin Tobin’s work in elevating the mix; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally praised as an energetic early‑84 set that ranks among the year's best, with the band consistently “rocking” throughout.
